channel.title: Daily India News
channel.description: Your daily AI-generated executive briefing covering Top India News, Polity, Law, Economy, Environment, Foreign Policy, Technology, Sports, and Health & Science.

item.title: Feb 26, 2026
item.description: From Prime Minister Modi's landmark address in Israel to the Supreme Court's ruling on an NCERT textbook, we bring you the top stories. Also, a look at India's booming economy and our T20 World Cup performance!

item.title: Feb 27, 2026
item.description: India's economy is soaring with robust GDP growth, while the nation navigates complex geopolitical challenges from Afghanistan-Pakistan tensions to evolving trade relations with the US. Domestically, significant judicial and political debates are unfolding, from the Supreme Court's strong stance against a textbook chapter on judicial corruption to the ongoing discourse on AI governance and electoral processes.

item.title: Feb 28, 2026
item.description: India's economy surges with robust GDP growth and new data series, while the Supreme Court makes significant pronouncements on the sedition law and nuclear liability. We also explore India's strategic push in AI, critical environmental challenges, and evolving international relations.

item.title: Mar 01, 2026
item.description: Today, we delve into escalating tensions in the Middle East and their ripple effects on India, the complex dance of diplomacy between India and Canada, India's robust economic growth and ambitious manufacturing drive, and critical discussions around judicial independence and environmental protection.

item.title: Mar 02, 2026
item.description: This briefing delves into the volatile geopolitical landscape following the reported death of Iran's Supreme Leader, examining its regional and global economic repercussions, particularly for India, alongside a critical assessment of India's foreign policy. Domestically, we analyze significant legal challenges to digital privacy and judicial interpretations of family law, while exploring India's macroeconomic stability, foreign investment dynamics, decarbonization hurdles, and evolving societal economic trends.

item.title: Mar 03, 2026
item.description: Today's briefing delves into the escalating Middle East conflict and its global economic ripples, the Indian Supreme Court's critical stance on AI-generated judgments, and India's evolving economic landscape, from international trade ambitions to domestic monetary policy and financial sector integrity.

item.title: Mar 04, 2026
item.description: This briefing delves into the escalating geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and their profound economic implications for India, alongside a critical examination of India's Supreme Court addressing the integrity of judicial processes in the age of artificial intelligence and advancing significant social justice reforms.

item.title: Mar 05, 2026
item.description: Today's briefing delves into the escalating Middle East crisis and its profound economic and geopolitical implications for India, alongside critical developments in the Indian judiciary concerning AI integration and corporate insolvency. We also examine the Reserve Bank of India's strategic interventions in financial markets and significant international security concerns.

item.title: Mar 06, 2026
item.description: This briefing delves into the escalating geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and their profound economic implications for India, alongside a comprehensive analysis of significant judicial pronouncements and governance issues within India and the United States, and a critical look at India's evolving foreign policy landscape.

item.title: Mar 07, 2026
item.description: This briefing delves into the escalating geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and their potential global economic reverberations, alongside a comprehensive examination of India's judicial landscape, including landmark Supreme Court rulings on compensation and judicial efficiency, and critical discussions on the economic valuation of unpaid domestic labor. We also analyze India's robust economic performance amidst global uncertainties and its principled approach to international affairs.

item.title: Mar 08, 2026
item.description: This briefing delves into escalating global geopolitical tensions, from the Middle East to Russia's economic resilience, and their profound implications for India's economy. Domestically, we examine significant judicial reforms, landmark rulings on environmental governance, evidence law, and privacy, alongside India's evolving economic strategy and the interplay of federalism in foreign policy.

item.title: Mar 09, 2026
item.description: This briefing delves into the intricate geopolitical shifts in the Middle East, including Iran's leadership succession and its regional implications, alongside China's evolving foreign policy and a significant political change in Nepal. Domestically, we analyze critical developments within India's judiciary concerning gender equality and systemic biases, and examine the nation's economic trajectory, trade relations, and regulatory enforcement.

item.title: Mar 10, 2026
item.description: This briefing delves into the intricate geopolitical shifts in the Middle East and their immediate economic repercussions, alongside a comprehensive analysis of India's economic resilience in the face of global turbulence. We also examine the Indian judiciary's recent pronouncements, highlighting its role in upholding constitutional principles, ensuring social justice, and shaping governance.

item.title: Mar 11, 2026
item.description: Today's briefing delves into the escalating geopolitical tensions surrounding Iran and their far-reaching implications, alongside a comprehensive examination of the Indian Supreme Court's recent pivotal rulings impacting governance, social justice, and fundamental rights. We also analyze the dynamic landscape of India's economy, focusing on monetary policy, trade agreements, and key growth indicators.

item.title: Mar 12, 2026
item.description: Today's briefing delves into escalating geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and their global economic ramifications, alongside a series of landmark judicial pronouncements by India's Supreme Court on fundamental rights and governmental oversight. We also examine key economic indicators, regulatory shifts, and India's evolving foreign policy posture in a complex global landscape.

item.title: Mar 13, 2026
item.description: This briefing delves into the escalating geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and their profound economic implications for India, alongside a comprehensive review of recent landmark Supreme Court judgments shaping India's legal and social landscape, and an analysis of India's evolving economic strategy and international trade relations.

item.title: Mar 14, 2026
item.description: Today, we're covering everything from tragic international incidents and escalating global tensions to landmark legal decisions in India, including a big debate around menstrual leave, and a look at India's robust economic outlook despite global headwinds.

item.title: Mar 15, 2026
item.description: Today, we're tracking escalating global conflicts, major legal shifts in India including a landmark ruling on passive euthanasia, and a deep dive into India's economic trajectory and foreign policy challenges.

item.title: Mar 16, 2026
item.description: Today, we're tracking rising tensions in the Middle East, landmark legal decisions in India, and a mixed bag of economic news, from growth forecasts to local business struggles.

item.title: Mar 17, 2026
item.description: Today, we're tracking escalating tensions in the Middle East, a landmark ruling on passive euthanasia by India's Supreme Court, and a look at India's economic landscape, from IPOs to a surprising gas crisis affecting restaurants.

item.title: Mar 18, 2026
item.description: Today, we're tracking escalating tensions in the Middle East following a significant death, major rulings from India's Supreme Court impacting social policies and economic stability, and new developments in global trade and finance.

item.title: Mar 19, 2026
item.description: Today, we're diving into the escalating conflict in the Middle East and its ripple effects on global energy prices and India's economy, alongside a look at key Supreme Court rulings impacting everything from divorce laws to election processes, and a fascinating peek into India's evolving foreign policy and economic landscape.

item.title: Mar 20, 2026
item.description: From escalating global tensions and groundbreaking Supreme Court decisions impacting families to shifts in India's economy and a fascinating historical revelation, we've got a packed update for you today.

item.title: Mar 21, 2026
item.description: A looming international conflict in the Middle East is sending economic shockwaves globally, impacting everything from oil prices to fertilizer costs, while India's Supreme Court has been busy delivering a series of significant rulings on social and legal matters.
